calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Codify Academy, LLC, Chris Brody and Samuel Brody.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:58 a.m.

Steven Alfred Booska, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FC Marketplace, LLC.
Robert Eckart, Portfolio Monitoring Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff FC Marketplace, LLC was present, placed under oath and testified.
Both Mssrs. Booska and Eckart appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Codify Academy, LLC, Chris Brody or Samuel Brody.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract filed June 2, 2020.
Substitute Service on defendant Codify Academy, LLC, July 10, 2020 and effectuated on July 23, 2020.
Substitute Service on defendants Chris Brody and Samuel Brody, July 10, 2020 and effectuated on July 23, 2020.
Default as to both defendant Alycia R. Fleming entered on January 24, 2020.
There were no DOE defendants.

Exhibit A Security Agreement.......................................... ID/EVID
Exhibit B Payment Schedule............................................ ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of FC Marketplace, LLC, and against Codify Academy, LLC, Chris Brody and Samuel Brody, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $51,106.39.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,442.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $ 894.11.
Total - $63,267.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

The parties STIPULATE to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings conclude at 10:15 a.m.
